description: Detects PHP control flow and database calls that indicate MVC violations (logic in view files). Simplified from Rust: flags all if_statement nodes in PHP files as potential logic-in-view indicators. Cannot detect HTML output context, restrict to DB function calls (mysqli_query, pg_query), or filter by DB object variable names ($db, $pdo, etc.).

flag.message: control flow detected -- verify this file is not a view template mixing logic with presentation
